name:
Ultimate compatibility test: codegen generates Clojure, SCI evaluates it.
   Verifies that ALL codegen output formats produce valid code and that
   the :script format runs correctly in SCI eval-sci mode. > codegen :script format evaluates in SCI > script with multiple actions and assertions runs in SCI eval
